ham: Hi, your 10₹ recharge to Jio has been completed successfully. Your data balance is now 2GB. Enjoy!
spam: Hello! Your courier from <URL> was not delivered. Aapka package deliver nahi hua. Kripya address confirm karo aur ₹200 re-delivery fee pay karo <URL> ya to aapka package miss ho jayega. Reply YES to proceed.
